features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Main entry page with hero section, feature introduction, and pricing overview.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: User login and signup functionality using Supabase Auth.

features.name: Memory Creation
features.description: Feature to create and schedule messages/memories to be sent later.

features.name: Digital Vault
features.description: Secure storage for digital assets and legacy information.

features.name: Plans & Payment
features.description: Subscription plan management and payment processing via Toss Payments.

features.name: Online Memorial (Space)
features.description: Public or private memorial spaces for remembering loved ones.

features.name: Recipient Verification
features.description: Process for recipients to verify identity and access messages.
